listings.name: ClarityLift
listings.description: Organizational health intelligence from communication signals. No surveys, no surveillance.
listings.rationale: First-party Startvest product. Listed at v1 launch under disclosure-asterisk per Veto 2 of the directory's INTEGRITY.md. Methodology page at /methodology carries Version + Changelog headings; integrity statement at /integrity maps all six Layer 1 vetoes.

listings.name: adacompliancedocs
listings.description: ADA / WCAG compliance documentation tooling. Court-ready good-faith effort record. Built on the inverse premise of overlay vendors.
listings.rationale: First-party Startvest product. Listed at v1 launch under disclosure-asterisk per Veto 2. Methodology v1.0 and integrity statement both versioned with changelog. Conformance-claim guard (CRIT-SV-CONFORMANCE-CLAIM-GUARD) blocks 'full' publishes when critical axe findings remain open.

listings.name: FieldLedger
listings.description: DCAA-compliant operations and compliance tooling for federal contractors and construction businesses. WH-347 generation, FAR 31.2 indirect rates, audit log.
listings.rationale: First-party Startvest product. Listed at v1 launch under disclosure-asterisk per Veto 2. Methodology v1.0 and integrity statement both versioned. METHODOLOGY_VERSION wired into rate-letter and certified-payroll write paths so reproducibility flips PARTIAL → PASS at write time.

listings.name: IdeaLift
listings.description: Decision intelligence. Capture product decisions from Slack, Teams, and Discord. Prevent decay. Tell the storyline behind why decisions were made.
listings.rationale: First-party Startvest product. Listed at v1 launch under disclosure-asterisk per Veto 2. Bronze-only by design: IdeaLift is a non-compliance product and its INTEGRITY.md classifies 'Public methodology' as N/A. Authoring a faux methodology page just to clear Silver would contradict the published statement and fail Veto 6.
